url_discovery_method: Used provided Nissan_Japan_All_100_URLs_Journey_Mapped.json as canonical URL source; generated query-to-URL mappings and saved to /memories/querytoURLs.txt

query_policy.source_preference: Use existing QueryPortfolio.txt from task memory/context when available; if unavailable, generate portfolio as specified below.

generation_rules.structure: 7 brand topic categories × (5 non_branded + 5 branded) queries each
generation_rules.language_and_context: UK English phrasing with Japan buying context (mentions of Japan, cities, ownership norms where relevant)
generation_rules.tone: Conversational, AI-search oriented (natural language questions and informational queries)

non_branded_requirements.behaviour: Non-branded queries must not contain any of the prohibited terms or direct brand/model references; may include generic references like 'this car', 'electric SUV', 'family MPV'.

generation_rules.branded_requirements: May include brand, model, sub-brand or navigational intent (brand/model names allowed). Avoid inventing product facts or claims.
content_restrictions: Do not crawl external sites or validate claims
Do not invent product facts, unsupported specifications, prices, ratings or awards
Do not include speculative or unverifiable technical claims
Return final output as valid JSON only (no markdown or additional formatting)

portfolio_summary.selection_rule: 7 brand topic categories × 5 non-branded + 5 branded queries; 100 owned URLs from prior audit context output object

validation.source_note: Audit Context string in previous run output contained 66 parsed queries but declared 70. Four missing branded queries were completed from the Query Portfolio section in the same previous run output and mapped to owned URLs already present in pages[].

notes.source: Constructed from outputs (23).json previous run object.
notes.completion_note: Four branded gaps were completed from the Query Portfolio output because the Audit Context variable was parseable only after adding a closing brace and contained 66 query objects.

brand_topic_coverage.brand_topic_category: EV range, charging and battery confidence
brand_topic_coverage.why_relevant: EV purchase decisions in Japan depend heavily on range, charging infrastructure, battery warranties and home charging readiness.

brand_topic_coverage.brand_topic_category: Hybrid / e-POWER running costs and powertrain choice
brand_topic_coverage.why_relevant: Powertrain choice affects running costs, urban performance and ownership economics for many Japanese buyers.
Families prioritise space, seating flexibility, boot capacity and child-seat compatibility when choosing vehicles in Japan.
Safety tech, crash ratings and reliability are core trust signals that influence brand and model choice.

brand_topic_coverage.brand_topic_category: Value, offers, finance and total cost of ownership
brand_topic_coverage.why_relevant: Finance options, incentives and TCO calculations are high commercial-intent topics at point of purchase in Japan.
